<!--
  Please read before opening this pull request.
-->

## ⚠️ This project does not accept code contributions

Nova3DVisualiser is developed solely by its maintainer. **Pull requests will be closed
without merging**, and external forks are not merged back into the main project. This is a
deliberate single-author model — not a judgement on your work.

**If you have a bug or an idea, please open an Issue instead** — those are very welcome:

- 🐛 **Bug report:** use the Bug report issue template
- 💡 **Feature request / idea:** use the Feature request issue template
- 🔒 **Security issue:** follow the private process in [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the full policy. You are free to **fork** and
modify the project under **GPL-3.0**; forks simply live independently.
